brief: A 28-year-old man is arrested for the murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe; Trump stirs anger with video of Somali schoolchildren; Poland pledges memorial to WWII victims; Gaza aid worker killed; and AI papers explore missing data visualization and crime linkage analysis.
news_summary: A suspect is held in the Ann Widdecombe murder case; Trump's repost of Somali schoolchildren sparks outrage in Minnesota; Poland announces a memorial for WWII victims of Ukrainian nationalists; a Palestinian aid worker organizing World Cup screenings is killed by an Israeli strike; Kansas votes on electing its supreme court, targeting abortion rights.
papers_summary: ImputeViz offers a dashboard for diagnosing missing data and comparing imputation methods; an industrial study examines how analysts use AI for high-stakes crime linkage; and a landscape analysis reviews clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China.

en.brief: A 28-year-old man is arrested for the murder of former MP Ann Widdecombe; Trump stirs anger with video of Somali schoolchildren; Poland pledges memorial to WWII victims; Gaza aid worker killed; and AI papers explore missing data visualization and crime linkage analysis.
en.news_summary: A suspect is held in the Ann Widdecombe murder case; Trump's repost of Somali schoolchildren sparks outrage in Minnesota; Poland announces a memorial for WWII victims of Ukrainian nationalists; a Palestinian aid worker organizing World Cup screenings is killed by an Israeli strike; Kansas votes on electing its supreme court, targeting abortion rights.
en.papers_summary: ImputeViz offers a dashboard for diagnosing missing data and comparing imputation methods; an industrial study examines how analysts use AI for high-stakes crime linkage; and a landscape analysis reviews clinical translation of brain-computer interfaces in China.

zh.brief: 今日主要新闻聚焦台风巴威侵袭中国和台湾，导致大规模疏散和停电；同时，德国判决一起涉及中国公民的跨国性侵案。研究方面，值得关注的论文包括可视化数据缺失诊断工具、人工智能在犯罪关联分析中的应用，以及中国传统绘画构图分析系统。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威在中国浙江等地导致超过76万人疏散，台湾15万户停电；德国法院对由中国人组成的“老司机”性侵网络成员作出判决。
zh.papers_summary: arXiv论文涉及缺失数据可视化诊断（ImputeViz）、高风险犯罪关联分析中分析师使用AI的案例研究，以及基于构图图的中国传统绘画视觉分析系统（CompoVista）。

todays_image.caption: The telegram, once a symbol of urgent communication, mirrors the stark, swift delivery of news about a shocking arrest—a modern dispatch of a different kind of tragedy.
todays_image.title: Telegram
